report.summary: Day 16 standup: PUBLISH_QUEUE is empty (270+ pages live), no GSC organic signals yet but expected within days, Sprint 58 ready to launch with DeFiLlama Live API as lead item; 2 Jefe blockers remain, rate limiting and fallback coverage are today's top technical risks ahead of organic traffic arriving.

sections.title: Analytics — Overnight Traffic & Site Health
items: 270+ pages live — PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared yesterday (Day 15 milestone); 3 new pages published overnight (Pendle Finance, Quantum-Resistant Crypto, Best Perp DEX)
Google Search Console: No organic clicks/impressions yet — site is 15 days old; GSC signals typically appear at day 14-21 for new sites; earliest data expected today or tomorrow

Top expected performers once GSC activates: /tools/dca-calculator, /tools/portfolio-tracker, /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide, /compare/wallets/ledger-vs-trezor, /learn/pendle-finance-guide (fresh + high-interest DeFi topic)
Data pipelines overnight: CoinGecko healthy (60s TTL + fallback on prices/market-dominance), DefiLlama healthy (TVL/yields routing confirmed) — no downtime incidents
Critical risk as organic traffic begins: rate limiting covers only 2/13 API routes — any viral page hit or crawler burst could spike upstream API costs; this is pre-GSC urgency window

HUMAN COST OF LAST SPRINT (Day 15 session equivalent): 9 specialist roles activated in parallel — Researcher × 4 briefs, Content Writer × 12,400 words (4 guides), SEO Specialist × 4 pages, Frontend Dev (4 scaffolds + PendleYieldCalc component), Graphic Designer (8 assets: 4 OG + 4 SVG), Social Media Manager (12+ posts), PM, QA Engineer, DevOps. Human equivalent: ~$6,400/day × 5-day sprint = ~$32,000/sprint (~$1.66M annualized for a 9-person crypto specialist team at market rates). Current agent cost: effectively $0 marginal per sprint.

sections.title: Project Manager — Yesterday vs Plan
items: SHIPPED ✅ 4 learn guides built: Stablecoin Payments 2026 (GENIUS Act), Pendle Finance / Yield Tokenization, Quantum-Resistant Crypto, Best Perpetual DEXs — all with Article + FAQPage structured data, 5+ internal links, full SEO metadata
SHIPPED ✅ 4 OG images (data-viz style) + 4 SVG social cards (Alpenglow, OnFi, Quantum, Perp DEX theme)
SHIPPED ✅ PendleYieldCalc.tsx — interactive PT fixed-yield calculator with asset presets, scenario modes, APY color-coding
SHIPPED ✅ 3 pages promoted from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED (Pendle, Quantum, Perp DEX); queue now at 0
SHIPPED ✅ 12+ social posts drafted across 2 community cycles — ready to push
NOT DONE 🔴 Rate limiting: rate-limiter.ts exists but still unwired on 11/13 routes (carry-over Day 13 → Day 15 → today)
NOT DONE 🔴 Fallback data: only 2/13 routes have hardcoded fallback (prices + market-dominance); trending, defi-yields, fear-greed, market-metrics, news-rss have no fallback
NOT DONE 🟡 TS fixes: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 JSX errors) + stargate/page.tsx (unclosed <h1>) still unresolved
NOT DONE 🟡 Vercel redeploy: commit d3bce36 not yet live (Chrome extension not connected; manual trigger required at vercel.com/0x-machina/cryptodegen/deployments)
BLOCKED (Jefe): WalletConnect production Project ID — required for wallet connections, gamification attribution, referral tracking
BLOCKED (Jefe): GitHub Actions secrets — required for Playwright CI before any Sprint 58 code merges
AUDIT GAP: 100/270 published slugs have no page.tsx — triage needed to determine which need scaffolding vs planned pipeline

sections.title: CEO — Today's Top 3 Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Kick off Sprint 58: DeFiLlama Live API. Bloomberg Screener V3 is the highest-traffic tool on the site running entirely on mock data. Replacing mock TVL/APY/Volume with live llama.fi feeds is the single highest-credibility unlock this sprint. Real data signals quality to both users and Google's engagement metrics. Delegate: Data Engineer (pipeline) + Programmer (Screener V3 integration). This should ship before end of day.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiting before organic traffic hits. We are in a narrow window (GSC data imminent, meaning Google is crawling and indexing at scale). rate-limiter.ts is already built — this is a 30-minute wiring task across 11 routes, not a build task. Simultaneously add fallback data to the 4 remaining unprotected routes. Every day this is unresolved is a cost and reliability risk. Delegate: Data Engineer (rate limit + fallback wiring).

PRIORITY 3 — Resolve both Jefe blockers today. WalletConnect prod key (~5 minutes on cloud.walletconnect.com) and GitHub Actions secrets (~10 minutes in repo Settings) are the only things blocking wallet auth for real users AND automated QA before Sprint 58 merges. Sprint 58 adds Referral Backend + Email Drip — both require working wallet attribution. These are not dev tasks; they require Jefe's hands specifically.
